post.subject: Primogem Rewards: Greetings, Fairytale Kingdom Photographer! Take Part to Win Primogems!
post.content: Olah! Hello, Traveler~ I entered a mysterious place in my dream! Origami animals, toy figures... Is this the fairytale world? How to Participate Head to the new area "Simulanka" in the game and complete any of the following missions, and your participation will have been deemed successful. Mission 1: Take pictures of any two different origami residents in the Forest of Blessings and share them in the comments. Mission 2: Use your favorite character to take a group photo with any two toy figures of different colors in Constellation Metropole and share it in the comments. Mission 3: Take a picture of any miner gopher in the Broken Sea and share it in the comments. In addition, when exploring the new area in Version 4.8, you can also invite "Cat Upon the Eaves" Kirara (Dendro) to your party and obtain a new outfit reward. Mission 4: Select your favorite scenery in the new area and take photos of Kirara's new outfit, and share it in the comments.

post.desc: Olah! Hello, Traveler~ I entered a mysterious place in my dream! Origami animals, toy figures... Is this the fairytale world? How to Participate Head to the new area "Simulanka" in the game and complete any of the following missions, and your participation will have been deemed successful. Mission 1: Take pictures of any two different origami residents in the Forest of Blessings and share them in the comments. Mission 2: Use your favorite character to take a group photo with any two toy figures of different colors in Constellation Metropole and share it in the comments. Mission 3: Take a picture of any miner gopher in the Broken Sea and share it in the comments. In addition, when exploring the new area in Version 4.8, you can also invite "Cat Upon the Eaves" Kirara (Dendro) to your party and obtain a new outfit reward. Mission 4: Select your favorite scenery in the new area and take photos of Kirara's new outfit, and share it in the comments.

post.subject: Primogem Rewards: Teyvat Sports Contest Now Open!
post.content: Olah! Hello, Traveler~ The first Teyvat Sports Contest begins today! Take part in the event for a chance to win up to Primogems ×3,000! Category: Long-Distance Running How to play: 1. Start running from the designated starting points and charge towards the destination as fast as you can! 2. Travelers can freely select their party composition and route. You can also invite friends to complete the challenge in Co-Op Mode! 3. Note: You can't use Teleport Waypoints to cheat during the contest~ 4. Out of the two maps below, Travelers can choose a map that they are more familiar with to participate in the contest~
